name: zealpulse/zealpulse
description: ZealPulse — a real-time server-ops dashboard & live event board built on ZealPHP, exercising every framework phase (HTTP, request input, static/conditional GET, sessions, middleware, routing, streaming/SSE/WebSocket, Store/Counter/Cache, lifecycle modes, CGI, timers/tasks/signals, security, templates/htmx, infra).
